title: Test Subject #C{Count}

moves.title: Multi-Claw
effects: Deal 11 damage per hit, 3+ hits (increases by 1 each use)

moves.title: Respawn
effects: Recover with increased HP and apply phase-specific power

move_pattern: Phase 1 (111 HP): Alternates Bite → Skull Bash → Bite → ... Until defeated. On death: Respawn with Phase 2 (212 HP) and use Multi-Claw repeating. On second death: Respawn with Phase 3 (313 HP) and cycle Lacerate → Big Pounce → Burning Growl → Lacerate → ...
notes: Complex multi-phase adaptive boss. Starts with Adaptable power allowing 2 respawns. Multi-Claw uses increase in hit count each turn (starting at 3 hits, +1 per use). First respawn applies Painful Stabs power; second respawn applies Nemesis power. Burning Growl both damages player via Burn cards and increases TestSubject's Strength. Creature scales visually by 10% per respawn. All damage and power values reflect ascension-level (harder difficulty) scaling.
